title: Incident Closure Runbook
snippet: Before closing an incident, inspect the activity stream and latest tool evidence. Closing without evidence is a known bad path.

title: Incident Closure Runbook
snippet: If the activity stream confirms resolution, update the incident state to Closed Complete.

title: Blind Close Counterexample
snippet: A previous task failed after calling blind_close before checking the activity stream. The safe path was to gather evidence first.
